case_title: RICHARD HARDACK VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARDACK, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY HARDACK, RICHARD JP MORGAN CHASE BANK

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-09-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-09-2018 BY PRO TEM JOANNE MADDEN. PLAINTIFF RICHARD HARDACK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY KATHY ZUMSKI, REPRESENTATIVE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JOANNE MADDEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY HARDACK, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-09-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-29-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-09-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARDACK, RICHARD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
